modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to import CVs directly into Digital Measures.

full_description_text: The user was trying to import CVs into Digital Measures. They wanted to do it all at once instead of entering data line by line. It seems like they can't figure out how to do that.
short_description: Unable to import CVs directly into Digital Measures.
description: The user was trying to import CVs into Digital Measures. They wanted to do it all at once instead of entering data line by line. It seems like they can't figure out how to do that.
